expectations.text: Report identifies Brave as active provider (not Tavily)
expectations.evidence: Report states 'answer=null (confirms Brave)' and 'Search: Brave (TAVILY_API_KEY empty, BRAVE_API_KEY set)'

expectations.text: POST /api/search hit with at least 1 query, full response body logged
expectations.evidence: Happy path + special chars query both hit, results logged with count and timing

expectations.text: POST /api/search/images hit, Pexels results logged with image details
expectations.evidence: Happy path returned 3 images with full metadata (id, url, thumbnail, alt, photographer)

expectations.text: POST /api/search/download-image tested with a real image URL from Pexels
expectations.evidence: Downloaded real Pexels image, verified file serves with correct Content-Type and Cache-Control

expectations.text: SSRF probes executed: localhost, AWS metadata, private IP

expectations.evidence: pornhub.com URL returned 403 'This source is not allowed'

expectations.text: Error paths tested: empty query, no auth, missing fields
expectations.evidence: Empty query (400), no auth (401), missing fields (400), missing body (400) all tested

expectations.text: Response times logged for each search endpoint
expectations.evidence: Response Time Summary table with times for all endpoints
3 improvement suggestions: Brave image gap, CSRF inconsistency, provider indicator field
